prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-9PCEXERCTOYS-PNK-BUN Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 9pc Exercise Toy Bundle Pink Tennis Rackets Baseball Set Kids 3 and Up Description: Are you looking for a great toy gift set to encourage your child to play outside and encourage exercise during playtime? The 9pc Kidplokio Exercise Toys bundle set comes with 2 fun outdoor games for kids to play with outside and practice sports skills - a tennis playset and a baseball play set.

The tennis racket set comes with 2 tennis rackets and 2 matching tennis balls for the ultimate tennis match between kids. Tennis is a great sport for teaching children about how to play together competitively while encouraging sharing during playtime.

We've also included a plastic baseball set that comes with a 20" baseball bat featuring a large 3" barrel filled with 4 colorful and light plastic balls. Baseball is another great sport for kids to practice their hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills.

All of the exercise toys we've included in the bundle gift set are made of durable, high-quality materials that are safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision. The rackets and baseball bat are lightweight and easy to swing for little kids. Search Terms: tennis racket play sets tennis balls for kids children outdoor play exercise sets durable outdoor toys soft grip tennis rackets boys toys girls toys christmas gifts birthday gifts baseball bat sets plastic baseball toys safe for kids 3 and up Features: - 9PC EXERCISE TOYS BUNDLE - Kidplokio exercise toys bundle gift for kids comes with a plastic baseball bat, plastic balls, tennis rackets, and tennis balls for outdoor play; Encourages and promotes exercise; Great way to get outdoors - COMPLETE TENNIS RACKET SET - Tennis racket set comes with 2 tennis rackets and 2 matching tennis balls for the ultimate tennis match between kids; Helps teach the importance of sharing during playtime - PLASTIC BASEBALL SET - 20" baseball bat with large 3" barrel comes filled with 4 colorful and light plastic balls (color of bats ships at random); Helps teach hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills - SAFE FOR KIDS - All toys included in the bundle set are made of durable, high-quality materials that are safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision; Lightweight and easy to swing for little kids - SPECIFICATIONS - Number of pieces: 9 (2x rackets, 2x tennis balls, 1x baseball bat and 4x baseballs); Colors: Assorted (bat ships at random); Recommended age: 3+ years; Materials: plastic, foam === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio 9pc Exercise Toy Bundle Pink Tennis Rackets Baseball

tokens.name: Exercise Toy Bundle Tennis Rackets Baseball

tokens.name: Exercise Toy Bundle Tennis Baseball Set
